body.title: Cognition health metrics to infra.metrics — NE synthesis rate, LTM exposure count, arousal gate suppression
body.text:
# D-cognition-health-metrics-2026-05-11
**title:** Cognition health metrics to infra.metrics — NE synthesis rate, LTM exposure count, arousal gate suppression
**date:** 2026-05-11
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-cognition-health-metrics

## Decision narrative
Write three cognition health metrics to the existing infra.metrics table so Igor's signal/noise ratio is observable via SQL query. Points: cognition.ne_cycle_result (1.0/0.0 per NE cycle in coa.py), cognition.ltm_surfaced_count (per MemorySurfacer push), cognition.arousal_gate_suppression (when milieu_scale suppresses LTM salience). Add cortex.record_metric() helper first (OOP-first, table already exists). Alternative: write to ring_memory (wrong semantic — ring is conversation context, not telemetry). No purge in scope — infra.metrics accumulates but low-volume.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
